Week 11, 2026

Mar 10, 2026

Mar 9, 2026

  • Attended standup 🗑
  • Summarized world frame migration changes (#17095) and sent to Mario Prats — covers backend IK/grasp/viz behaviors and frontend frame references 🗑

Week 10, 2026

Mar 6, 2026

  • Attended standup 🗑
  • Attended AI task force meeting. Submitted PR to add claude rules about jazzy porting that is being discussed. 🗑
  • Met with Shaur during mentoring time. Explained agents and skills etc. Reviewed old homework. Agreed that Griz would refactor and make smaller moving forward. 🗑
  • Made a lot of progress on getting rid of the world frame and being about to switch frames in the ui. Posted a couple of videos to demo-gifs. 🗑

Mar 5, 2026

  • Told Noah Wardlow about my GPU Process, VRAM, visualizer pane blanking issue. 🗑
  • Updated my claude developer guide pr and added to merge queue. 🗑
  • Approved Dave Coleman’s claude pr about workflow rules and refactored the pre-commit hook, which is in PR. 🗑
  • Annual review. Overall rating of 3 (satisfactory) and getting a 3% raise. 🗑
  • Finished touching up the Phase IIe final report and passed off to Nathan Brooks 🗑
  • Submitted some utility skill PRs 🗑
  • Started working on LoadImageFromFile package bug 🗑

Mar 4, 2026

  • Got my Claude pr through PR 🗑
  • Attended standup 🗑
  • Attended weeding 🗑
  • Attended bi weekly engineering meeting 🗑
  • Started a new claude developer guide PR. 🗑
  • Started a new PR for a few testing notes for claude. 🗑
  • Reviewed and merged a few of Dave Coleman’s claude PRs 🗑
  • Started reviewing erosion/dialation behaviors. 🗑
  • Started converting some lab_sim objectives from clipseg to SAM3. 🗑
  • Made progress on the affordances Phase IIe final report. Finished in markdown, need to copy to google doc and get Nathan Brooks’s section for the NPR added. 🗑

Mar 3, 2026

  • Started addressing Dave Coleman’s comments on my claude PR and reviewed his short claude pr. 🗑
  • Submitted Erode and Dilate PRs as test of claude. 🗑
  • Attended standup. 🗑
  • Attended internal LRN checkin. 🗑
  • Attended Kristen’s 3 month review. 🗑
  • Attended external LRM checkin. 🗑

Mar 2, 2026

  • Attended standup 🗑
  • Worked on converting CLAUDE.md into skills, tools, and sub files according to “best practices” 🗑
  • Interviewed candidate 🗑
  • Met with Kristen Suchabout chessbot and next steps. Merged her current PR as it was dragging progress. Decided that her next steps would be to get the SAN parser PR’ed first before the other functions. 🗑

Feb 17, 2026

  • Kept troubleshooting SAM3 behavior. Got through image exemplar producing really bad stuff, but now want to troubleshoot why the background is being masked instead of parts in image exemplar. Got through that too by adding bounding box padding for image exemplar. 🗑

Feb 16, 2026

  • Meeting with Nathan Brookson Phase IIe status 🗑

Jan 21, 2026

  • Weeding 🗑
  • Met with Jonathan Fries, Michael Janney, Dave Grant,Bilal Gill about Gecko 🗑
  • Tried to get the malloc counter bug to a stand I can hand it off to Mario Prats. Found out the initial approach wasn’t failing on allocations. Updated approach does but there’s actually allocations that shouldn’t be happening in our controllers. Had claude investigate and indeed there are very plausible places where it looks like we are allocating so I want to prove that to Mario but ultimately he should decide how the code changes. 🗑

Jan 14, 2026

  • Reviewed Kristen Such’s removal prs. 🗑
  • Got started with claude on the next set of sam3 prs and added them to draft 🗑
  • Mentored, Kristen Such, talked about “constant functions” and how they should be turned into variables, how to test functions directly, what line coverage vs branch coverage is, and troubleshot her pr not getting the right coverage (probably a configuration error), and that she needs to be weary of her editor. 🗑

Dec 17, 2025

  • Mario says that https://github.com/PickNikRobotics/moveit_pro/pull/15794 was written partially by claude but he has the chat window open and peer programs with it for every PR 🗑
  • Quarterly retro 🗑
  • Attended tech talk 🗑
  • Attending capacity planning meeting 🗑
  • Sent a revised video to Dave Coleman for the automasking and updated the objective. 🗑
  • Updated the objective more to see if automasking can be used for the picking and added some filtering behaviors. Modified the Pick from Left Bin to try and use automasking and added new filter behaviors which work decently well. 🗑

Dec 16, 2025

  • Tested out a couple of AI workflows for generating mesh assets using a combination of Nano Banana Pro, Hitem3d, and SAM3D (online) 🗑
  • Standup 🗑
  • Product roadmap meeting 🗑
  • Reviewed Josh Whitley’s “Skip CI jobs if no change” PR 🗑
  • Accepted my sonar cloud issues related to merging 8.10 into main 🗑

  • Submitted PR to example workspace for automasking 🗑
  • Sent video to Dave Coleman 🗑
  • Responded to too too many messages 🗑

  • Had short design discussion on a feature request for overriding core objectives 🗑

  • Had design meeting with David Sobekon ML refactor 🗑

Week 50, 2025

Dec 12, 2025

  • Troubleshooting GPU issue/ML objective bug not working 🗑

Dec 11, 2025

  • Standup 🗑
  • Tested ML inference on workstation again 🗑
  • Met with Josh Whitley on workstation nvidia driver discrepancy 🗑
  • Monthly meeting 🗑
  • Removed high resolution test from pr 🗑

  • Troubleshot ML issues with Breelyn and https://github.com/PickNikRobotics/moveit_pro/issues/15678 🗑

Dec 10, 2025

  • Standup 🗑
  • Responded to Jose about rescheduling, moved to later in the day 🗑
  • Checked out Mike’s log level bug 🗑
  • Extending the timeout on my failing Real Image Validation test and started a conversation about if that would be removed or CI adjusted somehow? 🗑
  • Weeding meeting 🗑
  • Engineering Bi-Weekly meeting 🗑
  • Virtual coffee 🗑
  • Fixed up pull request to add cmake flag for high resolution sam2 automasking image test 🗑
  • Updated “MoveIt Pro Technical Specifications Sheet” to include current ML features 🗑
  • Check lab_sim vs mock_sim VRAM usage as an indicator of how much VRAM mujoco uses 🗑
  • Met with Ivan Rulikfrom Lightspeed to talk about Nav2, spent most of the time talking about ML features in Pro and upcoming ML features. Scheduled another meeting to focus on Nav2. Learned about their Dex platform that they are building which is an AMR with two cobot arms for wiring a house. 🗑

Dec 9, 2025

  • Made QA assignment list 🗑
  • Sprint balancing meeting 🗑
  • Started heaptrack analysis for memory leak bug 🗑
  • Addressed sonarcloud issues on final automask pr 🗑
  • Scheduled meeting with Lightspeed to talk about nav2 opportunities 🗑

  • Addresses PR feedback for SAM2 automasking behavior 🗑
